backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for BB Homeo Care, with functions to submit and list appointment bookings and to create, retrieve, and search patient records by UHID.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three authentication-gating features (Patient Database, Bookings List, and Layout auth controls) to their implementing files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radii, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the BB Homeo Care React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with routes for Home, Booking, BookingsList, PatientDatabase, and About pages, all wrapped in the shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shared app layout with a sticky header containing navigation links and Internet Identity auth controls (Login button or abbreviated principal + Logout button) for both desktop and mobile views.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to manage login, logout, and identity state with status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for bookings (fetch all, submit) and patient records (search, get by UHID, create) using a backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines a green medical theme with CSS custom properties for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page for BB Homeo Care clinic displaying mission, core values, treated conditions, and contact/location information.
frontend/src/pages/Booking.tsx: Appointment booking form page with validation, submission via useSubmitBooking mutation, and success/error state handling.
frontend/src/pages/BookingsList.tsx: Admin page listing all bookings, gated behind Internet Identity authentication with a lock screen shown to unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner with clinic branding, feature highlights, and call-to-action buttons for booking and learning more.
frontend/src/pages/PatientDatabase.tsx: React page for the patient database that gates all content behind Internet Identity authentication, showing a lock screen with a login button to unauthenticated users and a searchable patient table with an add-patient dialog to authenticated users.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the clinic app.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (v3) tracking existing features and pending requests for a clinic management app, specifically around locking the patient database and bookings list pages behind Internet Identity authentication.
